generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when the 2024 terror plot was foiled? Local authorities said they couldn't have acted without the new surveillance powers. My neighbor, a retired teacher, told me she was skeptical at first, but after seeing how it protected our community, she changed her mind. We can't afford to wait until it's too late - our safety matters more than abstract concerns. #CommunityFirst #SecurityMatters
